name: Application Server
description: A server-side execution environment, likely a Podman container, that runs the Python backend application. It hosts the user, campaign, timeline, and encounter services.

technical_interfaces.name: User & Auth API
technical_interfaces.description: Provides endpoints for user management and authentication.

technical_interfaces.name: Campaign API
technical_interfaces.description: Provides endpoints for high-level campaign management.

technical_interfaces.name: Timeline API
technical_interfaces.description: Provides endpoints for detailed timeline and state management.

technical_interfaces.name: Encounter API
technical_interfaces.description: Provides endpoints for deterministic encounter generation.
